title: Hiraea kunthiana
taxonomy: Hiraea kunthiana is a species of plant in the family Malpighiaceae. It belongs to the genus Hiraea. The family Malpighiaceae is a group of flowering plants commonly known as Barbados or Malpighia. This plant is native to South America. Hiraea kunthiana is classified as a dicotyledonous plant, meaning it has two cotyledons or seed leaves.
uses: Hiraea kunthiana has been traditionally used in folk medicine in South America. The plant has been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
